title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 30 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 30 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report July 30 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/07/2025
Today, Dalian iron ore futures opened higher but moved downwards, fluctuating in the doldrums during the day. The most-traded contractI2509 eventually closed at 789, with a daily decline of 0.44%. Traders sold goods according to market conditions; steel mills adopted a wait-and- see attitude, with some purchasing at lower prices.
